applicationFormStage.title: Application Form Stage
applicationFormStage.description: The stage of the relevant application forms that the user requested.

recruitmentPostingNameOrId.title: Recruitment Posting Name Or ID
recruitmentPostingNameOrId.description: The name or Salesforce record ID of the recruitment posting record the user is currently viewing.

shouldLimitApplicationForms.title: Should Limit Application Forms
shouldLimitApplicationForms.description: A boolean value that indicates whether to return only a limited number of relevant application forms. This should always be set to true.

recruitmentRequisitionNameOrId.title: Recruitment Requisition Name Or ID
recruitmentRequisitionNameOrId.description: The name or Salesforce ID of a recruitment requisition record.

recruitmentRequisitionState.title: Recruitment Requisition State
recruitmentRequisitionState.description: The state that recruitment requisitions for a similar vacancy must have. The default value is Closed.
